column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a calendar with a bright face" | TEXT="楽しみにしております" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Staring at the door waiting for someone" | TEXT="待ち遠しいですわ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Preparing extra tea and sweets with glee" | TEXT="わくわくいたします" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Checking her reflection in a mirror repeatedly" | TEXT="準備万端ですわ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a cruise ship or carriage approaching" | TEXT="いよいよですわね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Sparkling eyes looking at a closed gift box" | TEXT="何が入っているかしら" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a ticket or pass close to her chest" | TEXT="夢が広がります" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Tapping her chin with a fan rhythmically" | TEXT="想像するだけで幸せ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking towards the horizon with hope" | TEXT="明日が待ち遠しいわ"
